questions.question: Describe the purpose of the copy-on-write (COW) technique in relation to disk caching and directory operations.
questions.hint: Explain how COW improves performance in scenarios where file modifications occur

questions.question: What are the advantages of implementing a copy-on-write mechanism for a file system, and how does it differ from traditional file system update methods?
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits of reducing unnecessary disk writes

questions.question: Suppose a file system uses a copy-on-write mechanism and a writer processes a file modification that causes a page write. What happens to the original page, and how does this affect disk I/O performance?
questions.hint: Explain the consequences of COW for disk I/O operations
